name: Saputo Foodservice
description: Saputo is a prominent manufacturer and distributor of a diverse range of high-quality cheeses, including various pressed cheeses that inspire menu creativity. Their product lineup features flavor-infused Cheddar and Jack cheeses, highlighting unique aging processes and innovative flavor combinations, catering to the evolving tastes of consumers.

name: Schreiber Foods
description: Schreiber Foods specializes in processed cheese, along with other dairy products like cream cheese and yogurt. The company emphasizes food safety and product quality, serving a global market.

name: Leprino Foods
description: Leprino Foods Company specializes in dairy products, particularly mozzarella cheese, and offers Leprino Precision Melt Cheese, which features controlled melt technology specifically designed for enrobed and high-heat applications. This innovative cheese maintains its integrity and provides optimal fill, addressing common issues with traditional cheeses.

name: Dairy Craft India Pvt Ltd
description: Dairy Craft specializes in a variety of processed cheese products, including convenient options like grated, sliced, and block cheese, designed for easy use in pizzas, sandwiches, and snacks. Their offerings include a blend of mozzarella and cheddar with excellent melting properties, as well as flavored and smoked varieties, all made from high-quality milk.

name: Great Lakes Cheese Co
description: Great Lakes Cheese is a prominent manufacturer of processed cheeses, emphasizing their commitment to high quality and safety throughout the production process. They ensure that all cheese products are sourced responsibly and comply with stringent food safety standards.

name: Bridge Cheese
description: Bridge Cheese specializes in producing a variety of high-quality functional cheese products, including fat-filled and heat-stable options, which cater to specific needs and price points. Their commitment to customer collaboration and innovative production techniques allows them to create bespoke cheese blends that ensure both functionality and budget requirements are met.

name: Cheesepop food group
description: The company specializes in innovative cheese products, including processed cheese, which is real cheese enhanced with melting salts to improve texture, control melting points, and extend shelf life. Their offerings highlight cost-saving opportunities for the food manufacturing industry while ensuring high quality and sustainability.

name: Traditional Cheese Company
description: The Traditional Cheese Company specializes in a variety of specialty cheeses, bringing over 30 years of experience in providing high-quality dairy products to the Irish market.

name: FLORALP
description: The company specializes in creating a diverse range of cheese products, including processed cheese varieties like Swiss Toast Cheese, Cheddar Burger Cheese, Emmentaler Cheese, and Jalapeño Cheese, all of which are ideal for cold or hot sandwiches. Their commitment to quality and flavor positions them as experts in the dairy industry.

name: Saputo Inc.
description: Saputo is a prominent manufacturer of high-quality cheese and dairy products, processing approximately 11 billion liters of milk annually into a diverse range of cheeses. As one of the top cheese producers in the USA and the largest branded cheese manufacturer in the UK, Saputo's extensive product portfolio includes various cheese types, which are marketed under both their own brands and private labels.
